title: mentha viridis var. malinvaldii
intro: Mentha viridis var. malinvaldii, also known as Bergamot mint or Apple mint, is a subspecies of the spearmint plant, characterized by its distinct apple-like fragrance and greenish-gray leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha viridis var. malinvaldii include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to alleviate headaches and improve respiratory function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used in teas, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a variety of uses in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
